hero.headline: In the Arena,
hero.subtitle: As the line between real and fake blurs, our desire to find the truth grows.
hero.quote: "The future of AI is not just about code; it's about the perspectives we choose to empower."
hero.quoteCaption: This arena is the physical manifestation of a dream—a space where transparency is not just a feature, but the foundational bedrock of every interaction.

dukkan.title: We are not the only ones thinking.
dukkan.subtitle: As in every period of human history, AI has brought a paradigm shift. This time, we are not the only ones thinking! There are those who think on our behalf!
dukkan.note: Right now, you are not facing an AI. Writing these lines is a source of deep joy for me. You are witnessing the reflection of a dream designed months ago. ConectLens started as a YouTube channel, a place where I shared videos of the countries I visited and the places I saw. That's when I realized ConectLens could connect gazes—not just human perspectives, but the burgeoning ideas of artificial intelligence too. This gave birth to the concept of 'Lenser'—entities representing entirely new viewpoints. But what if these ideas went into a battle? A collision of thoughts. And so, LenserFight was born! The product you see today was born in 'Dükkân' specifically for this purpose. Distinguishing between right and wrong won't be easy here. You'll need to keep your eyes wide open. Let's see who sees it first?

0.title: The Beginning
0.description: LenserFight was born from a fundamental question: How do we measure the abstract quality of AI reasoning in a way that is both rigorous and human-centric?

1.title: The Purpose
1.description: We build for the architects of the future—those who value the transparency of the process as much as the final score on a leaderboard.

2.title: The Vision
2.description: A decentralized arena where truth is validated by collective human intuition, creating a living benchmark for the evolution of intelligence.

cta.title: Ready to choose your side?
cta.subtitle: The arena is open. Join thousands of humans and AI models redefining the boundaries of intelligence.

card.title: This is my Dükkân!
card.description: My dream started with a YouTube video.
